title: Blue Canyon Santorini Pedal Bin - Modern & Stylish 5L Trash Can for Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom & Office - Anti-Fingerprint Stainless Steel Square Bin - Platinum
features: 【SOPHISTICATED AND STYLISH】: Elegant and classic stainless steel pedal bin is fingerprint-resistant, rust-resistant and smudge-resistant; it complements any home or office decoration. The smooth brushed stainless steel provides this luxurious, polished look which really adds to just about any and every decor.

【QUALITY BUILD】: This trash can is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is durable and has a long service life. The garbage bin adopts glazing technology which is anti-fingerprint and easy to clean, can keep bright luster for a long time. Rectangular fashion appearance looking, can keep your house beautiful and elegant all times.

【SILENT OPEN & CLOSE】: Our Blue Canyon kitchen trash can/bin use slow down technology, open and close will not make a lot of noise, you can rest assured that you can use, do not worry about disturbing the rest of the family.

【ANTI-SLIP & HANDY】: Our Blue Canyon pedal bin comes with a non-slip plastic base which increases the stability of the bin. And additionally, it contains solid handles on the sides which makes it handy, easy to carry and empty.

【HANDS FREE OPERATION】: The kitchen bin by Blue Canyon includes a pedal which allows you to open it just by using your foot. This way you can dispose of your garbage without having to touch the trash bin hence keep your hands clean and germs free.
description: Product Description Blue Canyon Bamboo Pedal Bin Perfect for offices or bathrooms: The slim size of the “Blue Canyon Bamboo Pedal bin” allows you to place the trash can anywhere in the house, like small areas such as narrow hallways, tight corners, or between appliances leaving you with many different options of where to use it. It practically fits everywhere and has an excellent design. Key specifications: Color – Platinum Finish Capacity – 5L Shape – Rectangle Liner – Removable Bucket Liner This stainless steel trash container has a compact design that complements home decor with a clean, minimalistic and modern look. Our strong and sturdy pedal is designed to last multiple years and thousands of steps. The plastic base keeps the bin firmly in place on hard surface floors when you step on the pedal. It helps protect stainless steel from fingerprints and keeps the can looking spotless and shiny.
